pipeline_config:
name: Sample Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Build
        run: npm run build
  
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test
  
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, test]
    steps:
      - name: Deploy
        run: echo 'Deploying...'
